caption: A person’s hands are seen opening a sports card product on a red and black themed table. A box labeled "OBSIDIAN" with the text "2 AUTOGRAPHS!" is present. The person reaches into the box to pull out a holographic sports card featuring a basketball player in a red jersey. In the background, a man wearing a dark shirt is visible in a smaller inset window, sitting in a room with shelving and equipment. The on-screen logo "JASPYS" and the website "CASEBREAKS.COM" are displayed prominently. As the sequence progresses, the person first reaches toward the box, then lifts the specific holographic card out of its packaging to showcase it toward the camera. The setting remains consistent throughout the clip, focusing on the card opening process.
